title: rubus emarginatifolius
intro: Rubus emarginatifolius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The leaves and stems of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus emarginatifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in the form of dried leaves and roots in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
